name: Home Ventilator (E0465/E0466)
description: Review for duplicate home ventilator claims (E0465/E0466). Allows up to 2 per day in some cases.

overpayment_conditions.excess_units: More than 2 ventilator claims (E0465/E0466) on the same day without historical justification.
overpayment_conditions.duplicate_history: Claim matches existing payment pattern in history suggesting a duplicate billing.

explanation_templates.valid: Up to 2 per day allowed based on medical necessity and history.
explanation_templates.duplicate: Excessive frequency identified based on member history for home ventilator billing.
